Access colors from the Nour20 palette by name

Nour_cols20.Rd

Access colors from the Nour20 palette by name

Usage

Nour_cols20(...)

Arguments

...

Color names to retrieve. If empty, returns all 20 colors.

Value

A named character vector of hex color codes.

On this page

Developed by Nourhan Abdelfattah.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.3.
